HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

15#define DOMAIN_H
16
17#include <blitz/array.h>
18#include <fstream>
19#include "Bsp3D.h"
20#include "GreenF.h"
21#include "IncidentField.h"
22#include "RWGFun.h"
23#include "SIEForm.h"

25#include "Triangle.h"
26#include "globals.h"

38class Domain {
39 protected:
40 // --- Discretization and excitations ---
41 std::vector<RWGFun> rwgFuns;
42 std::vector<IncidentField *> incidentFields;
43 Bsp3D bspTree;
44
45 // --- Physical properties and formulations ---
46 GreenF *grnFun;
47 SIEForm *formulation;
48
49 // --- Domain parameters ---
50 dcmplx vacuumWavelength;
51 dcmplx omega;
52 int index;
53 static bool NeedsAccurate;
54
59 virtual int InitGrnFun() = 0;
60
61 public:
62 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
63 // Construction & lifetime
64 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
71 Domain(SurfaceMesh *mesh, int dIndex, dcmplx inVacuumWavelength);
72
74 virtual ~Domain();
75
76 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
77 // Mesh / basis assembly
78 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
85 int AddTrianglesFromMesh(SurfaceMesh *mesh, int dIndex);
86
90 int PrintAllRWGCentroids();
91
96 int PrintAllEdges(SurfaceMesh *mesh);
97
103 RWGFun *RGWFunPtr(int index);
104
105 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
106 // Domain metadata
107 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
112 int Index();
113
115 static void EnableAccurate();
116
117 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
118 // Formulation assembly hooks
119 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
125 virtual int InitFormulation(dcmplx vacWavelength) = 0;
126
132 virtual int FillLSEMatrix(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *matrix);
133
140 virtual int FillLSEMatrixAndGradient(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *matrix,
141 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *gradmatrix[3]);
142
148 virtual int FillLSEVector(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *vector);
149
150 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
151 // Geometry queries
152 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
158 bool IsInside(rvec point);
159
163 virtual bool IsLayered() = 0;
164
169 bool hasDipoles();
170
171 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
172 // Field evaluation (post‑processing)
173 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
180 virtual cvec SecFieldE(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos);
181
187 virtual cvec IncFieldE(rvec pos);
188
195 virtual cvec SecFieldH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos);
196
202 virtual cvec IncFieldH(rvec pos);
203
210 virtual std::pair<cvec, cvec> SecFieldEandH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector,
211 rvec pos);
212
213 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
214 // Power & cross sections
215 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
222 double Power(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
223
229 virtual std::vector<double> scatteringCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector) = 0;
230
237 virtual double absorptionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector) = 0;
238
245 virtual double extinctionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector) = 0;
246
247 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
248 // Incident field management
249 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
255 int AddIncident(IncidentField *inIncident);
256
260 virtual int ClearIncidentFields();
261
262 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
263 // Material properties (implemented by subclasses)
264 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
270 virtual dcmplx Epsilon(rvec pos) = 0;
271
277 virtual dcmplx Mu(rvec pos) = 0;
278
279 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
280 // Layered‑media helpers
281 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
286 virtual GreenF* GetGrnFunLayeredFields() const = 0;
287
292 virtual void newGrnFunLayered(std::vector<rvec> &posvec) = 0;
293
294 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
295 // Convenience incident creators (to be implemented by subclasses)
296 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
304 virtual int AddPlaneWave(dcmplx wavelength, rvec propagationDirection,
305 cvec polarization) = 0;
306
313 virtual int AddDipole(rvec location, cvec polarization) = 0;
314
325 virtual int AddGaussian(double wavelength, double waist, rvec focal_point,
326 rvec propagationdirection, cvec polarization) = 0;
327
328 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
329 // Lookup tables
330 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
336 int InitLookupTable(LookupTableBin *tin);
337};
338
339#endif
Bsp3D.h
3D Binary Space Partitioning (BSP) utilities for triangle meshes.
GreenF.h
Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
IncidentField.h
Abstract interface for incident electromagnetic excitations.
RWGFun.h
Header for the RWGFun class.
SIEForm.h
Header for the SIEForm class.
SurfaceMesh.h
Declaration of the SurfaceMesh class and mesh edge struct.
Triangle.h
Declaration of the Triangle class (surface element with cached geometry).
Bsp3D
Minimal 3D BSP tree for triangle meshes.
